pantry.title: My Pantry
pantry.emptyPantry: Your pantry is empty. Add some items to get started!

auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link. If you don't receive one, this email address may already be registered — try signing in instead.
auth.emailConfirmFailed: Email confirmation failed. Please try again.

recipes.title: Recipe Generator
recipes.searchLabel: Or search for a specific recipe:
recipes.searchPlaceholder: e.g., apple pie, chicken pasta, orange glazed salmon...
recipes.noSubstitutionsFound: No substitutions found for this ingredient with the selected filters.
recipes.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your dietary filters or searching for a different ingredient.
recipes.substitutionTip: Tap any ingredient to find smart substitutions
recipes.clickForFullRecipe: Click for full recipe with detailed ingredients & measurements
recipes.emptyStatePrompt: Add ingredients or search for a specific recipe to get started!
recipes.emptyStateTip: Try: "apple pie", "chicken pasta", or add ingredients like "tomatoes", "chicken"

mealPlan.title: Weekly Meal Plan
mealPlan.generateShoppingList: Generate Shopping List for This Week

deductModal.title: Deduct Ingredients from Pantry
deductModal.depleted: uses {{quantity}} {{unit}} · you have {{pantryQuantity}} {{pantryUnit}} → will be removed

mealPlan.mobileTipMessage: Tap empty calendar slots to add recipes, then select from your saved recipes list
mealPlan.favoriteHint: Favorite recipes from the Recipes tab to add them here!

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.pressEnterToAdd: Press Enter to quickly add items
shopping.proTipMessage: Items added here are saved to your account and synced across devices
shopping.emptyList: No items in your shopping list yet

donate.title: Food Donation Impact
donate.turnWaste: Turn food waste into community impact
donate.donateToFoodBanks: Donate These Items to Food Banks
donate.turnExpiringFood: Turn your expiring food into community meals
donate.locationDesc: Find food banks and drop-off sites near you
donate.startImpactMsg: Record your first donation to see your environmental and social impact.
donate.pantryEmptyDonate: Your pantry is empty. Add items first.
donate.taxTipMessage: Food donations to registered nonprofits may be tax-deductible. Keep this record for your taxes!

favorites.title: Favorite Recipes
favorites.noFavoritesMessage: No favorites yet. Start saving recipes you love!

notifications.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scan.chooseAddPantry: Choose how to add pantry items
scan.mayTakeFewSecs: This may take a few seconds
scan.barcodeScannerDesc: Scan product barcodes to automatically add items with nutritional info
scan.expiryScannerDesc: Point at a 'Best By' or 'Use By' date to automatically capture it
scan.aiScannerDesc: Take a photo of any food item for AI identification and nutritional info
scan.receiptUploadDesc: Upload a grocery receipt to automatically add multiple items at once

mission.subtitle: Your AI-powered kitchen companion
mission.missionText: We're on a mission to reduce food waste and help families eat healthier while saving money. Every ingredient in your pantry has potential — let's unlock it together!
mission.step1Desc: Scan barcodes or manually add what's in your kitchen
mission.step2Desc: Get personalized recipe suggestions based on your pantry
mission.step3Desc: Drag recipes to your weekly calendar and auto-generate shopping lists
mission.step4Desc: Donate expiring items to local food banks and track your impact

toasts.noItemsDetected: No items detected. Try a clearer photo with better lighting.
toasts.failedAnalyzeImage: Failed to analyze image. Please try again.
toasts.cameraAccessDenied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions.
toasts.demoLoaded: Demo data loaded! Showing 427 meals donated across 23 donations! 🎉
toasts.productNotFound: Product not found in database. Please enter the name manually.
toasts.barcodeLookupFailed: Barcode lookup failed. Please enter the item name.
toasts.addedWithEdit: Item added - Please edit to add the proper name
toasts.couldNotParseDate: Could not parse date. Please enter manually.
toasts.noExpiryFound: No expiration date found. Try again with better lighting.
toasts.failedReadExpiry: Failed to read expiration date. Please try again.
toasts.imageTooLarge: Image too large. Please use an image under 10MB
toasts.locationGranted: Location access granted! Sorting by proximity.
toasts.locationDenied: Location access denied. To enable, go to your browser settings and allow location for this site.
toasts.geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation not supported by your browser.
toasts.estimatedPrices: Using estimated prices. AI pricing temporarily unavailable.
toasts.pleaseSelectDonate: Please select a location and items to donate
toasts.databaseSyncError: Database sync error. Please refresh the page and try again.
toasts.switchedToMealPlan: Switched to Meal Plan! Drag this recipe onto your calendar.
toasts.failedAddItem: Failed to add item. Please try again.

survey.title: Personalize GroceryGenius
survey.subtitle: Takes about 60 seconds. Helps us tailor recipes and calorie goals just for you.
survey.step3Title: How comfortable are you in the kitchen?
survey.aiWillGenerate: ✨ AI will generate a label for custom diets
survey.customDietPlaceholder: Or type your own: e.g. Mediterranean...

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete all your data including pantry, recipes, meal plans, and shopping lists. This cannot be undone.
settings.failedToGenerateLabel: Failed to generate label. Diet added with original text.
settings.failedToDelete: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

add.title: Add pantry items
add.desc: Tap 'Add Item' to open the form, then type an ingredient name and save it to stock your pantry.

scan.title: Scan a barcode
scan.desc: Use your camera to scan a product barcode and we'll add it to your pantry automatically.

expiry.title: Your pantry items
expiry.desc: All your items appear here. Items highlighted in red are expiring soon — add an expiry date when saving any item to enable tracking.

input.title: Find recipes by ingredient
input.desc: Enter what you have and our AI will find recipes that use them.

pantry.title: Use your pantry
pantry.desc: Tap this to load your entire pantry as recipe ingredients in one go.

dietary.title: Dietary filters
dietary.desc: Filter recipes by your dietary preferences — synced automatically from your settings.

calendar.title: Plan your week
calendar.desc: Browse recipes and add them to days on your calendar to plan ahead.

shopping.title: Auto-build your shopping list
shopping.desc: Missing ingredients from your meal plan are sent straight to your Shopping list.

list.title: Your shopping list
list.desc: Items are auto-generated from your meal plan and pantry gaps.

check.title: Check off as you shop
check.desc: Tap any item to mark it as bought.

add.title: Add items manually
add.desc: You can always manually add items to your list here.

expiring.title: Donate expiring food
expiring.desc: Food near its expiry date appears here so you can donate it before it goes to waste.

map.title: Find a food bank
map.desc: Discover nearby food banks and drop-off points based on your location.

grid.title: Your saved recipes
grid.desc: Recipes you've hearted live here for quick access any time.

heart.title: Save a recipe
heart.desc: Tap the heart on any recipe card to add it to your favorites.

open.title: Personalize your settings
open.desc: Open settings to tailor GroceryGenius to your needs.

dietary.title: Dietary preferences
dietary.desc: Set your dietary needs here — recipes and filters update automatically everywhere.

calorie.title: Daily calorie goal
calorie.desc: Set your daily calorie target and we'll track your progress throughout the day.

btn.title: Calorie tracker
btn.desc: Tap this button any time to open your daily calorie tracker.

panel.title: Track your nutrition
panel.desc: Log meals here and watch your calorie and nutrition progress in real time.
